# 247 Local Trades

> 247LocalTrades connects homeowners in the Southern US with pre-verified,
> certified HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and roofing contractors.
> Exclusive leads — one contractor per job, not a bidding war.
> Every job graded. Certification earned, not permanent. 24/7 live agent support.

## About

- [About 247 Local Trades](https://247localtrades.com/about/): Our mission, the 247 Certified program, and why we're different from HomeAdvisor and Angi.

## Services

- [Request Service](https://247localtrades.com/request-service/): Submit a service request for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, or roofing in Northwest Florida.
- [HVAC Services](https://247localtrades.com/florida/northwest-florida/hvac/): AC repair, installation, maintenance, and emergency service across Escambia and Santa Rosa counties.

## Service Areas — Northwest Florida (FL-01 Pilot)

- [Florida Hub](https://247localtrades.com/florida/): All Florida service areas.
- [Pensacola](https://247localtrades.com/florida/pensacola/): Pensacola-area HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and roofing services.
- [Gulf Breeze](https://247localtrades.com/florida/gulf-breeze/): Gulf Breeze-area services including coastal corrosion specialists.
- [Milton](https://247localtrades.com/florida/milton/): Milton and Pace area home services.
- [Navarre](https://247localtrades.com/florida/navarre/): Navarre Beach and surrounding area services.

## Key Differentiators

- **Exclusive leads**: One contractor per job — homeowners never trigger a bidding war.
- **247 Certified program**: 4 pillars — Pre-Verified, Guaranteed Live Agent, Every Job Graded, Certification at Risk.
- **Hyperlocal expertise**: ZIP-level content with neighborhood-specific data on housing eras, utility providers, and coastal conditions.
- **Founder**: Justin Sonntag, based in Pensacola, FL. Built 247 Local Trades to fix the broken lead generation model in home services.

## Contact

- Phone: (850) 403-9797
- Website: https://247localtrades.com
- Service Area: Northwest Florida (Escambia and Santa Rosa counties)
